##Figure 3A

library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyquant)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(rstatix)
library(rprojroot)
library(wesanderson)


virome_met_dt <- merge(virome_dt, meta_dt, by = "sample_ID")
virome_met_dt$City_Site <- str_c(virome_met_dt$City, ", ", virome_met_dt$Site)
virome_met_dt$Date <- as.Date(virome_met_dt$Date, format = "%d-%m-%Y")
select_dt <- virome_met_dt %>%
      filter(species %in% c("Rotavirus A Human", "Norwalk virus", "Betapolyomavirus secuhominis", "Betapolyomavirus hominis", 
                            "Hepatovirus A","Human mastadenovirus A", "Human mastadenovirus B","Influenza A virus",
                            "Human respirovirus 1","Human respirovirus 3","Severe acute respiratory syndrome-related coronavirus", "Human immunodeficiency virus 1"
                          )) %>%
      mutate(Fortnight = floor_date(Date - days(day(Date) %% 14), unit = "day")) %>%
      group_by(sample_ID, City, Fortnight, species) %>%
      summarize(RPKMF = sum(RPKMF), .groups = "drop") %>%
      group_by(species, City) %>%
      mutate(rel_ab = RPKMF / sum(RPKMF)) %>%
      ungroup()
    
movp <- select_dt %>%
      group_by(Fortnight, City, species) %>%
      summarize(rel_ab = sum(rel_ab),
                RPKMF = sum(RPKMF), .groups = "drop") %>%
      complete(Fortnight, City, species, fill = list(rel_ab = 0, RPKMF = 0)) %>%
      mutate(species = gsub("Rotavirus A Human", "Rotavirus A Human", species),
            #species = gsub("Rotavirus A", "Rotavirus A", species),
             species = gsub("Norwalk virus", "Noroviruses", species),
             species = gsub("Betapolyomavirus secuhominis", "JC polyomavirus", species),
             species = gsub("Betapolyomavirus hominis", "BK polyomavirus", species),
             species = gsub("Hepatovirus A", "Hepatitis A Virus", species),
             species = gsub("Human mastadenovirus A", "Human mastadenovirus A", species),
             species = gsub("Human mastadenovirus B", "Human mastadenovirus B", species),
             species = gsub("Influenza A virus", "Influenza A virus", species),
             species = gsub("Human respirovirus 1", "Human Parainfluenza Virus 1", species),
             species = gsub("Human respirovirus 3", "Human Parainfluenza Virus 3", species),
             species = gsub("Severe acute respiratory syndrome-related coronavirus", "SARS-CoV2", species),
             species = gsub("Human immunodeficiency virus 1", "HIV-1", species)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = Fortnight, y = RPKMF, color = City)) +
      geom_ma(ma_fun = SMA, n = 3, linetype = "solid", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) +
      scale_x_date(date_breaks = "2 month", date_labels = "%b-%y") +  # <- Updated here
      scale_color_manual(values = c(
        "Ahmedabad" = "#0070c0",
        "Gandhinagar" = "#da3030",
        "Vadodara" = "#354e68",
        "Rajkot" = "#ffa700"
      )) +
      facet_wrap(vars(species), scales = "free_y", labeller = label_wrap_gen()) +
      labs(x = "Date (Fortnightly)", y = "RPKMF") +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13), 
        legend.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 13), 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = alpha("white", 0.7)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, colour = "black", size = 11), 
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10), 
        strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"), 
        strip.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "#e5e5e5", size = 0.5, linetype = "solid")
      )
    
    movp
	
	
##Figure 3B
heatp <- virome_met_dt %>%
  filter(species %in% c("Norwalk virus", "Enterovirus D", "Rotavirus A", 
                        "Influenza A virus", 
                        "Severe acute respiratory syndrome-related coronavirus", 
                        "Respiratory syncytial virus", 
                        "Hepatovirus A", "Astrovirus MLB1",
                        "Human respirovirus 1", "Human respirovirus 3", 
                        "Enterovirus C", "Vesiculovirus indiana", "Human immunodeficiency virus 1",
                        "Mumps orthorubulavirus", "Measles morbillivirus",
                        "Rhinovirus A")) %>%
  mutate(Month = floor_date(Date, "month"), FDate = format(Month, "%b-%Y")) %>%
 # filter(Month >= as.Date("2023-09-01") & Month <= as.Date("2024-09-30")) %>%  # Filtering here
  group_by(sample_ID, City, Site, Month, species) %>%
  summarize(RPKMF = sum(RPKMF)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(species) %>%
  mutate(rel_ab = RPKMF/sum(RPKMF)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(Month, City, Site, species) %>%
  summarize(rel_ab = sum(rel_ab),
            RPKMF = sum(RPKMF)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  complete(Month, Site, species, fill = list(rel_ab = 0, RPKMF = 0)) %>%
  filter(City != "NA") %>%
  mutate(species = gsub("Enterovirus D", "Enterovirus D68", species),
         species = gsub("Norwalk virus", "Noroviruses", species),
         species = gsub("Severe acute respiratory syndrome-related coronavirus",
                        "SARS-CoV2", species),
         species = gsub("Hepatovirus A", "Hepatitis A Virus", species),
         species = gsub("Human respirovirus 3", "Human Parainfluenza Virus 3", species),
         species = gsub("Human respirovirus 1", "Human Parainfluenza Virus 1", species),
         #species = gsub("Enterovirus C", "Human poliovirus strain Sabin 1", species),
         species = gsub("Enterovirus C", "Enterovirus C", species),
         species = gsub("Vesiculovirus indiana", "Vesicular stomatitis Indiana virus", species),
         species = gsub("Human immunodeficiency virus 1", "HIV-1", species),
         species = gsub("Mumps orthorubulavirus", "Mumps orthorubulavirus", species), 
         species = gsub("Measles morbillivirus", "Measles virus", species)) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=Month, y=species, fill=log10(RPKMF))) +
  geom_tile(color = "black") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = '#3e387a', high = '#fe715e', 
                      na.value = 'white') +
  facet_wrap(vars(City), nrow = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "months",
    date_labels = "%b-%y",
    limits = as.Date(c("2023-08-15", "2024-09-30"), by = "1 month"),  # Exact limits
    expand = c(0, 0)  # Remove extra space
  ) + 
  labs(x = "Date", y = "") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=1,colour = "black", size = 11), 
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black"), 
        strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 13), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(strip.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"), 
        strip.background = element_rect(color="black", fill="#e5e5e5", size=0.5, linetype="solid"))

heatp


##Figure 3C
heatp2 <- virome_met_dt %>%
    filter(species %in% c("Human mastadenovirus A", "Human mastadenovirus B", "Human mastadenovirus C", 
                          "Human mastadenovirus D", 
                          "Primate bocaparvovirus 1", 
                          "Primate bocaparvovirus 2", "Human mastadenovirus F", 
                          "Adeno-associated dependoparvovirus A", "Adeno-associated dependoparvovirus B", 
                          "Human mastadenovirus E", "Betapolyomavirus secuhominis", 
                          "Mupapillomavirus 1" , "Betapolyomavirus hominis")) %>%
    # mutate(Week = floor_date(Date, "weeks", week_start = 1)) %>%
    mutate(Month = floor_date(Date, "month"), FDate = format(Month, "%b-%Y")) %>%
    group_by(sample_ID, City, Site, Month, species) %>%
    summarize(RPKMF = sum(RPKMF)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    #group_by(species, Site) %>%
    group_by(species) %>%
    mutate(rel_ab = RPKMF/sum(RPKMF)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    group_by(Month, City, Site, species) %>%
    summarize(rel_ab = sum(rel_ab),
              RPKMF = sum(RPKMF)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    complete(Month, Site, species, fill = list(rel_ab = 0, RPKMF = 0)) %>%
    filter(City != "NA") %>%
    mutate(species = gsub("Human mastadenovirus A", "Human mastadenovirus A", species),
           species = gsub("Human mastadenovirus B", "Human mastadenovirus B", species),
           species = gsub("Human mastadenovirus C", "Human mastadenovirus C", species),
           species = gsub("Human mastadenovirus D", "Human mastadenovirus D", species),
           species = gsub("Primate bocaparvovirus 1", "Primate bocaparvovirus 1", species),
           species = gsub("Primate bocaparvovirus 2","Primate bocaparvovirus 2", species),
           species = gsub("Human mastadenovirus F", "Human mastadenovirus F", species),
           species = gsub("Adeno-associated dependoparvovirus A", "Adeno-associated dependoparvovirus A", species),
           species = gsub("Adeno-associated dependoparvovirus B", "Adeno-associated dependoparvovirus B", species),
           species = gsub("Human mastadenovirus E", "Human mastadenovirus E", species),
           species = gsub("Alphapapillomavirus 6", "Alphapapillomavirus 6", species), 
           species = gsub("Betapolyomavirus secuhominis", "JC polyomavirus", species), 
           species = gsub("Hepatitis B virus", "Hepatitis B virus", species),
           species = gsub("Betapolyomavirus hominis", "BK polyomavirus", species),
           species = gsub("Alphapapillomavirus 7","Alphapapillomavirus 7", species)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=Month, y=species, fill=log10(RPKMF))) +
    geom_tile(color = "black") +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = '#3e387a', high = '#fe715e', 
                        na.value = 'white') +
    facet_wrap(vars(City), nrow = 3, scales = "free_x") +
    theme_bw() +
    scale_x_date(
      date_breaks = "months",
      date_labels = "%b-%y",
      limits = as.Date(c("2023-08-15", "2024-09-30"), by = "1 month"),  # Exact limits
      expand = c(0, 0)  # Remove extra space
    ) + 
    labs(x = "Date", y = "") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=1,colour = "black", size = 11), 
          axis.text = element_text(colour = "black"), 
          strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 13), 
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
          panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()) +
    theme(strip.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"), 
          strip.background = element_rect(color="black", fill="#e5e5e5", size=0.5, linetype="solid"))
  
  heatp2
  
##Figure S6


  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(lubridate)
  library(ggplot2)
  
  heatp2_animals <- virome_met_dt %>%
    filter(species %in% c(
      "Pigeon circovirus",
      "Equine rotavirus",
      "Carnivore protoparvovirus 1",
      "Beak and feather disease virus",
      "Feline rotavirus",
      "Mammalian orthoreovirus",
      "Porcine stool-associated circular virus 4",
      "Ovine mastadenovirus B",
      "Chicken anemia virus",
      "Betapolyomavirus macacae",
      "Primate norovirus",
      "Avian dependoparvovirus 1",
      "Canine morbillivirus",
      "Carnivore bocaparvovirus 2",
      "Galliform aveparvovirus 1",
      "Fowl aviadenovirus D",
      "Fowl aviadenovirus E",
      "Carnivore bocaparvovirus 3",
      "Avian coronavirus", #Added 3 based on Manuscript
      "Chicken anemia virus",
      "Gyrovirus galga1",
      "Bat luteovirus",
      "Rocahepevirus ratti"
      )) %>%
    mutate(
      Month = floor_date(Date, "month"),
      FDate = format(Month, "%b-%Y")
    ) %>%
    group_by(sample_ID, City, Site, Month, species) %>%
    summarize(RPKMF = sum(RPKMF), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(species) %>%
    mutate(rel_ab = RPKMF / sum(RPKMF)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    group_by(Month, City, Site, species) %>%
    summarize(
      rel_ab = sum(rel_ab),
      RPKMF  = sum(RPKMF),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    complete(
      Month, Site, species,
      fill = list(rel_ab = 0, RPKMF = 0)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(City) & City != "NA") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Month, y = species, fill = log10(RPKMF))) +
    geom_tile(color = "black") +
    scale_fill_gradient(
      low = '#3e387a', high = '#fe715e',
      na.value = 'white'
       ) +
    facet_wrap(vars(City), nrow = 3, scales = "free_x") +
    scale_x_date(
      date_breaks = "1 month",
      date_labels = "%b-%y",
      expand = c(0, 0)
    ) +
    labs(x = "Date", y = NULL) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust=1,colour = "black", size = 11), 
          axis.text = element_text(colour = "black"), 
          strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 13), 
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
          panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()) +
    theme(strip.text.x = element_text(size = 13, colour = "black"), 
          strip.background = element_rect(color="black", fill="#e5e5e5", size=0.5, linetype="solid"))
  
heatp2_animals
